name: voacanga africana
mechanism: Alkaloid constituents can modulate neuronal signaling pathways.
safetyNotes: Avoid in pregnancy; Avoid with cardiovascular conditions; May interact with MAOIs; Avoid use during pregnancy unless advised by a clinician, do not combine with serotonergic drugs or MAOIs without medical guidance or may interact with MAOIs.

description: Voacanga africana is a small tree native to West Africa.
